description: Configure rblock-specific model parameters such as bond-block model (BBM) settings.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock configure ...') via command interface

keywords.name: facet-total
keywords.description: Specify that rblock-rblock contacts with area less than f multiplied by the minimum of the total facet area of the two rigid blocks in contact should not be created. The default value is 0.01 . This check happens whenever there is a new contact detection event.

keywords.name: relative
keywords.description: The amount of expansion is computed as the product of f and the radius of a {circle in 2D; sphere in 3D} with the same size as the rigid block. Thus the expansion varies per rigid block. The default value is 1e-5 . The inertial properties are also unchanged as a result of dilation.

keywords.name: remap-interval
keywords.description: Contacts are detected between rigid blocks every i cycles regardless of the amount of displacement. This is necessary to ensure that
